# Medicopharm

> Bulgarian pharmaceutical production laboratory founded in 1995, specialising in dietary supplements, oral care, and foot care products. GMP certified. All products use proprietary technologies protected by patents.

## Company

- [Home](https://www.medicopharmk.com/): Medicopharm company overview, mission, and product highlights
- [Contact](https://www.medicopharmk.com/contact): Contact details, address, phone, fax, email, and enquiry form

**Address:** 64, Chataldja str., 1504 Sofia, Bulgaria
**Phone:** +359 2 9431800
**Fax:** +359 2 9431636
**Mobile:** +359 878 923575, +359 878 240196
**Email:** mpharm@mail.bg
**Website:** https://www.medicopharmk.com
**Founded:** 1995
**Certification:** GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice)

## Products

- [All Products](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products): Full product catalogue — dietary supplements, oral care, foot care

### Dietary Supplements — Apple Pectin Based

- [Apple Aqua Dia Pectin](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/AppleAquaDiaPectin): Apple pectin-based dietary supplement for detox and digestive support
- [Apple Aqua Pectin Detox Filter](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/AppleAquaPectinDetoxFilter): Apple pectin detox and filtration supplement
- [Apple Aqua Pectin Professional](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/AppleAquaPectinProfessional): Professional-grade apple pectin supplement
- [ProBio Pectin 6 Sachets](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/ProBioPectin6Sasets): Probiotic pectin supplement, 6-sachet pack
- [ProBio Pectin 250g](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/ProBioPectin250g): Probiotic pectin supplement, 250g bulk pack

### Dietary Supplements — Others

- [Calciev Gluconat](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/CalcievGluconat): Calcium gluconate dietary supplement
- [Natriev Citrat](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/NatrievCitrat): Sodium citrate dietary supplement
- [Osteolla](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/Osteolla): Bone and joint support supplement

### Oral Care

- [OralProtect Classic](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/OralProtectClassic): Classic oral care mouthwash
- [OralProtect Forte](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/OralProtectForte): Forte-strength oral care mouthwash
- [OralProtect Jazzy](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/OralProtectJazzy): Jazzy variant oral care mouthwash
- [OralProtect Za Pushachi](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/OralProtectZaPushachi): Oral care product for smokers
- [Svezh Dyh](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/SvezhDyh): Fresh breath oral care product

### Foot Care

- [MycoProtect Foot Powder](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/MycoProtectFootPowder): Antifungal foot powder
- [MycoProtect Foot Spray](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/MycoProtectFootSpray): Antifungal foot spray
- [MycoProtect Fungi](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/MycoProtectFungi): Antifungal foot treatment
- [Fresh Foot Spray](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/FreshFootSpray): Refreshing foot spray
- [Foot Odour Free](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/FootOderFree): Foot odour eliminator
- [Corns Callouts Cleaner](https://www.medicopharmk.com/products/CornsCalloutsCleaner): Corns and calluses treatment

## Technology

The laboratory's formulation expertise covers: liquid solutions, molecular formulations, emulsions, suspensions, nanogel, sprays, granules, powders, gels, pastes, and creams. The team includes industrial pharmacists, bioengineers, biotechnologists, and electronic and mechanical engineers.

## Languages

Site available in: English, Bulgarian (Български), German (Deutsch), French (Français).
